name: Egg Tacos
recipeIngredient: 1 cup Shredded Monterey Jack or Cheddar cheese.
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat taco shells according to package instructions.
2. In a bowl, beat together eggs, milk, salt, and pepper until well combined.
3. Heat a nonstick medium skillet over medium-high heat until hot enough to sizzle a drop of water.
4. Pour in the egg mixture and immediately reduce the heat to medium-low.
5. Gently stir the egg mixture with a spatula across the bottom and sides of the skillet to form large, soft curds.
6. Cook the eggs until they are thickened and no visible liquid remains, but they are still moist, about 1 minute.
7. Divide the egg mixture among the taco shells.
8. Garnish as desired with lettuce, tomato, cheese, salsa, and sour cream.
